killer_cell.note: Fraction of tasks where hooked-Haiku passes and unhooked-Haiku fails.

summary.quality_lift_footnote: Lift = fraction of tasks where hooked arm passes AND unhooked arm fails (same driver). Generous: any rep passing counts. (DEC-V0-B4-QUALITY-LIFT-001)
summary.directional_targets_note: Pass-bar columns are directional targets only. No KILL conditions pre-data. (DEC-V0-B4-SLICE2-MATRIX-002)
